name: vision_analyze
description: Analyse an image using a vision-capable LLM. Accepts a local file path or a public image URL. Returns a structured analysis of the image content. Use for BPMN diagrams, UML charts, process flowcharts, architecture diagrams, screenshots, and any non-text visual content. Requires the active provider to have a 'vision' model preference configured.

image.description: Path to a local image file (absolute or relative to project root) OR a public https:// image URL.

question.description: What to analyse or extract from the image. Example: 'Identify all BPMN swim lanes and decision points.' or 'List the entities and relationships shown in this UML diagram.' If omitted, the skill generates a general description of the image content.
question.default: Describe the content of this image in detail.

context.description: Optional text context to help interpret the image (e.g., 'This is a BPMN process model for a loan approval workflow.'). Null if no additional context.

analysis.description: LLM-generated analysis of the image content.

model_used.description: Vision model that produced the analysis.
